name: Wakala Agency
description: Wakala Agency is the automation division of Codegx Technologies. It helps organizations connect lead capture, onboarding, reporting, and workflow systems into dependable operations.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Custom web applications and responsive websites built with modern frameworks and best practices.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android that deliver seamless user experiences.

services.title: AI & Machine Learning
services.description: Machine learning and automation systems tied to clear business goals, operational data, and measurable outcomes.

services.title: Blockchain Solutions
services.description: Secure, transparent, and decentralized applications using blockchain technology for various use cases.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: User-centered design that combines aesthetics with functionality to create intuitive and engaging digital experiences.

services.title: DevOps & Cloud Services
services.description: Streamlined development operations and cloud infrastructure management for optimal performance and scalability.

team.name: Peter O. Oluoch
team.bio: Software engineer with over 10 years of experience in building enterprise solutions and leading development teams.

team.name: Sarah Johnson
team.bio: Full-stack developer and systems architect with expertise in scalable applications and emerging technologies.

team.name: Michael Chen
team.bio: Creative professional with a passion for crafting beautiful and functional user interfaces and digital experiences.

testimonials.quote: Codegx Technologies helped us turn scattered processes into reliable operating systems. Their team's delivery discipline exceeded our expectations.
testimonials.author: David Smith

testimonials.quote: Working with Codegx has been a game-changer for our digital presence. Their attention to detail and commitment to quality is unmatched.
testimonials.author: Lisa Wong

testimonials.quote: The secure workflow solution developed by Codegx improved our payment operations and made the process easier to audit.
testimonials.author: Robert Johnson
